goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory receipt record builder that records release-governance approved-action consume execution receipt evidence from ready receipt record authority while keeping action consume, durable writes, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, and providers closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, perform durable receipt writes, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready release-governance approved-action consume execution receipt record authority can produce a side-effect-free in-memory receipt record artifact.
Recorded-at and receipt-record evidence refs are required.
Merge, external actions, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Durable receipt persistence, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Recorded, missing recorded-at ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, durable receipt write, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-154 authorized release-governance approved-action consume execution receipt record without recording it.
